title: rtsc — Architecture
summary: Room-temperature superconductor (RTSC) discovery as an HONEST falsification framework — predict/screen candidates, run the falsifier cascade, report negative rulings as results. Target = 293 K @ 1 atm.
serve: python3 serve.py  (로컬 서버 + 브라우저 자동 오픈; file:// fetch 차단 우회)

tree.name: rtsc
tree.role: Room-temperature superconductor (RTSC) discovery as an HONEST falsification framework
tree.detail: JSON=SSOT; humans view architecture.html via `python3 serve.py`. Update in-place (not append); dated changes→CHANGELOG+git. Hierarchy via children, one fact per node. Per-material campaign SSOT=state/RTSC_LEDGER.jsonl. Materials carried over from the demiurge repo.

children.name: overview
children.role: RTSC discovery as an HONEST falsification framework
children.detail: Predict/screen candidates, run the falsifier cascade, report negative rulings as results. Target = 293 K @ 1 atm.

children.name: stance
children.role: Falsifier-first — all gates GATE_OPEN / absorbed=false; no candidate claimed to BE an RTSC
children.detail: absorbed=true would require accredited 4-probe transport + Meissner expulsion + measured H_c2/T_c (none of which this map flips). 0 RTSC predicted of the funnel candidates.

children.name: campaigns
children.role: Research lanes run to date

children.name: flat-band geometry
children.role: High-Chern flat-band quantum-geometry route — CLOSED-NEGATIVE across 10 independent paths
children.detail: paper: state/papers/flatband-geometry-ambient-roomt-closed. Structural cause = Fubini-Study bound (two levers — large ∫tr g AND strong coupling Ω — cannot coexist in one material).

children.name: superhydrides
children.role: Ambient superhydride lane (QE + QFORGE from-scratch)
children.detail: Li2CuH6 / Mg2IrH6 ambient-dynamically-unstable; AcBeH8, B-C clathrates inconclusive/deferred. High-pressure hydrides (H3S, LaH10, CaH6 …) recorded as references, deprioritized after the flat-band pivot.

children.name: QFORGE engine
children.role: QFORGE from-scratch el-ph engine (SCF→DFPT→el-ph→Tc), validated on Al/Nb/Pb
children.detail: Gaps walled: magmom (k-Stoner) and pbe-scf (gate-grade ecut OOM); production uses a hybrid path.

children.name: named-candidate DFT
children.role: Named +@ trilayer real-DFT — CoSn/hBN/Ta2NiSe5 lead, jointly unrealized (🟠, absorbed=false)
children.detail: Self-built QE 7.2 on summer (now an MPI/PARALLEL build per H_026) + local TB metric. Sub-findings H_019/H_024/H_025/H_026/H_027/H_029/H_030 below.

children.name: CoSn flat band
children.role: CoSn (layer A) hosts a real kagome flat band
children.detail: OUR PBE: W=0.158 eV (< 0.2 eV).

children.name: H_024 geometry lever
children.role: H_024: CoSn quantum-geometry lever SURVIVES
children.detail: NN-kagome TB fit to OUR bands → metric integral I=(1/2π)∫tr g d²k = 2.856, MATCHES measured QGT 2.87 (arXiv:2412.17809) → the g≥2 geometry LEVER SURVIVES.

children.name: H_024 position
children.role: H_024: deep position is REAL orbital-selection, not a PBE artifact
children.detail: ~1.45 eV-below-E_F position = real orbital-selection (CoSn has multiple orbital flat bands; PBE ~140 meV faithful to ARPES) → resolves the H_019 F2 position-FAIL.

children.name: H_024 D_s bound
children.role: H_024: bounds H_023's single unknown (D_s) via Peotta-Törmä+Huhtinen
children.detail: Geometry SUPPORTS f_mult≥1.164 at N=2 (conditional on doping+coherence; is_green=False; the cheap route, NOT the intractable full N=2 stack SCF).

children.name: Ta2NiSe5 Cmcm freeze
children.role: Ta2NiSe5 (layer B) gap: Cmcm PBE SCF FROZE (H_019/H_024)
children.detail: Cmcm PBE SCF froze across 10 recipes (byte-identical residuals) → high-symmetry excitonic-parent ill-conditioning.

children.name: H_025 sym-break
children.role: H_025: monoclinic C2/c ground state BREAKS the Cmcm freeze
children.detail: EXPERIMENTAL low-T monoclinic C2/c (Sunshine&Ibers 1985 via arXiv:2201.07750; vol 701.5Å³, 296 e⁻) → residual descends ~30× (17-18 → 0.45-0.64 Ry), live charge dynamics across plain PBE and PBE+U(Ni-3d=3eV). Symmetry-breaking insight CONFIRMED.

children.name: H_025 plateau
children.role: H_025: but both PLATEAU near-metallic, miss conv_thr
children.detail: Both plateau near-metallic (~0.5-0.9 Ry), don't reach conv_thr 1e-6 on the then-SERIAL single-core QE build.

children.name: H_026 root-cause
children.role: H_026: QE 7.2 pw.x was a SERIAL build — the true wall behind every DFT H_015→H_025
children.detail: make.inc MPIF90=gfortran, no -D__MPI, banner 'Serial version'; prior -np 12 = 12 redundant serial copies on 1 core. Cause: OpenMPI 4.1.6 runtime present but libopenmpi-dev (.so) missing → configure fell back to serial.

children.name: H_026 fix
children.role: H_026: fixed FREE in place → genuine parallel build
children.detail: sudo apt libopenmpi-dev + configure MPIF90=mpif90 --enable-parallel + make pw → banner 'Parallel version (MPI)', make.inc DFLAGS=-D__MPI, ldd links libmpi.so.

children.name: H_026 verdict
children.role: H_026: re-ran monoclinic SCF under genuine 6-core MPI — no-gap is PHYSICAL
children.detail: Across robust-PBE, PBE+U(Ni3d=3eV), high-smearing(degauss0.03): breaks freeze (~28-38× descent) but OSCILLATES in ~0.5-1.7 Ry near-metallic plateau, never 1e-6. HONEST NEGATIVE on a PBE-DFT gap (PBE-family lack the many-body excitonic gap; not a budget artifact, not fabricated).

children.name: H_026 beyond-PBE
children.role: H_026: gap NOT graduated to our-DFT
children.detail: Only beyond-PBE (HSE/GW/many-body) could host the excitonic gap.

children.name: H_027 scope
children.role: H_027: settled whether CoSn geometry lever survives the doping-to-E_F it requires
children.detail: On OUR fuller spin-polarized Co3Sn3 PBE bands (near-E_F flat band 45, W=0.167 eV, -0.44 eV below E_F).

children.name: H_027 doping
children.role: H_027 (1): rigid-band hole doping to reach E_F is EXTREME
children.detail: 4.73 e/cell = 1.58 holes/CoSn f.u. = 5.1% of valence → EXTREME (>0.7 h/f.u.; beyond electrostatic gating, needs chemical substitution). Direct consequence of the flat band's huge DOS (5→17 states/eV/cell).

children.name: H_027 geometry
children.role: H_027 (2): at that doped E_F geometry SURVIVES
children.detail: NN-kagome TB-fit metric integral I=2.855 ≈ measured QGT 2.87 → geometry survives (rigid-band; real doping can hybridize/spin-split, caveat named).

children.name: H_027 filling
children.role: H_027 (3): flat-band filling at the FAVOURABLE half-filling maximum
children.detail: Filling at E_F-on-band ν=0.507 → ν(1-ν)=0.250 = the favourable half-filling D_s^geom maximum.

children.name: H_027 verdict
children.role: H_027 verdict: geometry+filling SURVIVE but doping to reach E_F is EXTREME
children.detail: Lead path WEAKENED on ACCESSIBILITY, not on geometry; is_green=False. Trio stays 🟠 jointly-unrealized; absorbed=false.

children.name: H_027 doped SCF
children.role: H_027: no converged doped E_F (honest)
children.detail: Live doped SCF (tot_charge=4) under genuine 6-rank MPI is delicate (high-DOS flat-band metal, slow, prior tot_charge=2 MPI_ABORTed).

children.name: H_027 cross-spacer
children.role: H_027: cross-spacer coupling = labeled order-of-magnitude estimate
children.detail: Keldysh/Laturia hBN, steep geometry dilution ~4×/ML; FULL heterostructure cRPA DEFERRED.

children.name: H_029 scope
children.role: H_029: correlation lens on the H_027 wall — is extreme-doping a PBE artifact?
children.detail: Ortho-atomic Dudarev DFT+U(Co-3d) scan U=1..5 eV (bracketing lit CoSn DMFT U~5 eV; tractable mean-field DMFT proxy) on OUR converged Co3Sn3 cell, genuine 6-rank MPI (conda QE 7.5, all 5 SCFs converged 12-20 iter, FREE).

children.name: H_029 result
children.role: H_029: correlation does the OPPOSITE — flat band sinks DEEPER
children.detail: Kagome flat band sinks MONOTONICALLY deeper below E_F (PBE -0.44 → -1.16/-1.78/-2.80/-2.99/-3.3..-4.3 eV for U=1..5), never within ~0.2 eV of E_F at any physical U → doping wall SURVIVES two orthogonal lenses (PBE AND +U) and HARDENS; NOT a PBE artifact.

children.name: H_029 geometry
children.role: H_029: geometry invariant at every U
children.detail: I=(1/2π)∫tr g = 2.855 at every U (kagome manifold shape preserved; a stronger lever placed ever deeper = MORE doping, not less).

children.name: H_029 magnetism
children.role: H_029: +U induces strong magnetic order (competing-order signal)
children.detail: Co |mag| 0.43 µB PBE → 5.23 µB at U=5, a competing-order (H_014) signal CoSn lacks in plain PBE.

children.name: H_029 limit
children.role: H_029 limit: DFT+U is a static mean-field proxy
children.detail: Full DMFT could differ → a two-lens negative on the correlation-rescues-the-band hypothesis, not a proof.

children.name: H_030 scope
children.role: H_030: reconciled the doping wall vs method-lever research (RE-PARSE, no new SCF)
children.detail: Measured CoSn flat d-band ~100 meV below E_F (arXiv:2102.08979); re-parsed OUR saved bands.

children.name: H_030 two bands
children.role: H_030 (1): CoSn hosts BOTH a shallow pair AND a deep manifold
children.detail: Shallow narrow kagome pair (band45 -0.43 eV, band44 -0.57 eV, W~0.17 eV) + deep manifold (~-1.45 to -2.0 eV; H_024's -1.45 eV band42). H_019 non-spin-pol resolved ONLY the deep cluster; spin-pol Co3Sn3 (H_027/H_029) resolves BOTH.

children.name: H_030 shape invariant
children.role: H_030 (2): ∫tr g≈2.855 lever is a NN-kagome SHAPE invariant
children.detail: IDENTICAL on deep (H_024 I=2.856) and shallow (H_027 I=2.855) bands (both ≈ measured QGT 2.87) → H_027/H_029 already used the shallow near-E_F band; the '1.58 h/f.u.' is NOT a wrong-band bookkeeping artifact.

children.name: H_030 target-sensitive
children.role: H_030 (3): EXTREME figure is TARGET-sensitive (8× swing)
children.detail: Reaching PBE flat-band CENTER (-0.44 eV) costs 1.58 h/f.u. EXTREME; reaching MEASURED ARPES depth (~-0.10 eV) costs only 0.20 h/f.u. PHYSICAL (gating/few-%-Fe-In reach) — an 8× swing from the flat-band DOS pileup.

children.name: H_030 verdict
children.role: H_030 verdict: TRADE-OFF — wall PARTLY DISSOLVES
children.detail: Lead path re-opened for a 2D/onset-gated geometry device (E_F on flat-band ONSET, gating-reachable but weak D_s^geom ∝ ν(1-ν) at band edge); strong-D_s half-filled CENTER stays EXTREME.

children.name: H_030 same band
children.role: H_030: measured ~100 meV band = our shallow -0.44 eV band
children.detail: SAME d_xz/d_yz kagome flat band, PBE over-deepening it ~0.2-0.3 eV. doping_wall_dissolves=PARTIAL (onset MODEST, center EXTREME). Trio stays 🟠 jointly-unrealized; absorbed=false.

children.name: components
children.role: Repository components

children.name: predictor tools
children.role: src/ — flat-band geometry predictor + screening tools
children.detail: fbgeom_predictor.py, screen_catalogue.py, extract_candidates.py, kubo_pair_stiffness.py, lang_firsov_offdiag_metric.py, lane_* ED solvers, build_deck.py …. Verification/ranking/education tools — NOT discovery tools (predicted materials are all published).

children.name: rtsc_candidates.py
children.role: tool/rtsc_candidates.py = LIVING +@ candidate-materials registry + verifier
children.detail: Reuses rtsc_harness engine; current lead CoSn/hBN/Ta2NiSe5 clears the +@ box on paper (137K coordinate) but jointly unrealized (🟠, absorbed=false).

children.name: gw_bse_tc.py
children.role: gw_bse_tc.py = GW/BSE→exciton-glue→Eliashberg Tc pipeline (in-silico beyond-PBE)
children.detail: Stage-4 α²F_exc→λ,w_log→Allen-Dynes Tc LIVE+self-tested deterministic; GW/BSE engine Yambo = wiring point, dead-until-wired; computes IF-the-exciton-pairs Tc, absorbed=false.

children.name: PR#30 exciton-glue
children.role: PR#30: exciton-glue lever graveyard-leaning
children.detail: Research-first: proximity-SC-from-an-EI never measured in 50y; Ta2NiSe5 SC is phonon-mediated only when the exciton is destroyed.

children.name: PR#32 clean-glue update
children.role: CLEAN-GLUE update (research PR#32): Ta2NiSe5 competing_order none→trap
children.detail: PR#30: its exciton COMPETES with SC, not a glue. Added clean-glue LAYER_B rows (below).

children.name: clean-glue LAYER_B rows
children.role: clean-glue LAYER_B rows added
children.detail: cuprate-spin-fluctuation (300meV, MEDIATES+COEXISTS, Hg-1223 134K, strongest clean family); TbMn6Sn6/Au (only real measured proximity-SC, 3.6K); FeSe/SrTiO3 (interface-phonon ~100meV, bulk 8K→monolayer ~100K = 'method not material').

children.name: clean-glue net
children.role: Net: clean glues qualify but are energy-capped
children.detail: 252K/84K; no glue is BOTH clean AND room-T-energy. absorbed=false.

children.name: 7-verb pipeline
children.role: state/rtsc.demi — 7-verb pipeline manifest on the hexa cellrun dispatcher
children.detail: Verbs: specify, structure, design, analyze, synthesize, verify, handoff. analyze=pyfemm HTS magnetics (macOS honest-skip), verify=GetDP HTS EM. All cells GATE_OPEN.

children.name: ledger
children.role: state/RTSC_LEDGER.jsonl — per-material campaign ledger (SSOT)
children.detail: One line/material: status, stage, λ, ω_log, Tc, stability, verdict, absorbed, record-pointer. Verdict tiers: 🔵 formal · 🟢 GATE_CLOSED_MEASURED · 🔴 CLOSED-negative · 🟠 INCONCLUSIVE. Plus RTSC_HARVEST_PARTIAL.jsonl.

children.name: exports
children.role: state/exports/ — per-material verdict records + turnkey QE decks
children.detail: LiBeB ambient deck-set, wave3 decks. Heavy raw staging tarball (Li2MgH16, 568 MB) intentionally excluded from this repo.

children.name: papers
children.role: state/papers/ — campaign papers
children.detail: flatband-geometry-ambient-roomt-closed (closed-negative), rtsc-campaign-2026, rtsc-dft-h3s-textbook, rtsc-superconductor.

children.name: verification
children.role: HYPOTHESES — hypothesis-verification system (pre-register → falsify → run → verbatim verdict)
children.detail: Modeled on anima's UNIVERSE/. Turns campaign questions into numerically falsifiable, runnable cards.

children.name: registry
children.role: HYPOTHESES/HYPOTHESES.jsonl — flat registry, one JSON line per hypothesis
children.detail: Fields: id, slug, tier, title, card, verdict, artifacts.

children.name: cards
children.role: HYPOTHESES/cards/H_*.md — one card per hypothesis
children.detail: Frozen pre-registration + predictions + ≥5 measurable falsifiers + honest limits + verbatim run verdict. _TEMPLATE.md is the skeleton. Cards below.

children.name: H_001/H_002
children.role: H_001/H_002 (seeded)
children.detail: H_001 flat-band two-lever wall (CLOSED-NEGATIVE); H_002 ambient superhydride stability (INCONCLUSIVE).

children.name: H_003
children.role: H_003 bilayer division-of-labor SPLITs the two levers
children.detail: Box opens via a phonon-transparent/electron-opaque interface (relocates the wall, not removes it).

children.name: H_004
children.role: H_004 glue-reservoir ceiling
children.detail: Room-T needs an electronic eV-glue (phonons cap ~91 K).

children.name: H_005
children.role: H_005 2-factor capstone
children.detail: ~319 K in the toy band; room-T FACTORIZED into 2 unsolved sub-problems.

children.name: H_006
children.role: H_006 dimension lever (REAL-3D, src/fbgeom_3d.py)
children.detail: L_3D=1.84× real-but-partial; native 3D flat bands band-touching (clean bypass BLOCKED).

children.name: H_007
children.role: H_007 3-combination scan
children.detail: Stacking the real 3D lever relaxes the glue demand 1.84× (each lever necessary).

children.name: H_008
children.role: H_008 retarded-vertex bipolaron ED (REAL many-body ED on pool host summer)
children.detail: Pair-channel ⟨g⟩_pair exceeds the single-particle bound 4.27× in the anti-adiabatic corner (glue lever real, corner-confined).

children.name: H_009
children.role: H_009 connector spacer (trilayer A/C/B)
children.detail: A wide-gap/phonon-matched spacer (hBN-class) opens a fabricable [0.44,1.78 ML] electron-opaque/phonon-transparent window (the 3rd material is the link).

children.name: H_010
children.role: H_010 top-down lever-count scan
children.detail: More levers = achievability not redundancy (4 = minimal achievable count; 3D crosses the sub-eV glue line, connector is structural). Real verdicts preserved as *.out in the state run dirs.

children.name: H_011
children.role: H_011 +@ crux: trilayer self-consistent only for a BOSONIC glue
children.detail: Exciton/plasmon, Coulomb-field-coupled glue penetrates the electron-opaque connector (fermionic transfer glue blocked). Closed-form +@ deepening DEPLETED; remaining frontier = real DFT/cRPA trilayer (deferred).

children.name: H_012
children.role: H_012 topology gap COLLAPSES into the geometry lever
children.detail: Amplitude-only; room-T is stiffness-limited. (Fleet orthogonal-lever lanes — NOT free wins.)

children.name: H_013
children.role: H_013 fractionalization opens the box but needs an exotic ~800 meV deconfinement gap
children.detail: Relocated bill, ~77 K.

children.name: H_014
children.role: H_014 competing-order CLOSED-NEGATIVE — room-T glue drives SDW before SC
children.detail: Dominant risk realized; conditional on toy nesting. Binding open question now = competing order + the real DFT verdict.

children.name: H_015 setup
children.role: H_015 trilayer DFT electron-opacity (🟢 REAL-DFT) — first REAL ab-initio verdict
children.detail: Self-built QE 7.2 PBE+D3 scan of graphene/hBN(n)/graphene (n=0..3, summer pool; apt pw.x 6.7 aborts on a fortify buffer-overflow).

children.name: H_015 result
children.role: H_015 result: hBN suppresses interlayer electronic coupling (4/4)
children.detail: Graphene Dirac-point residual DOS 7.7× lower at n=1 vs direct contact (plateau); spacer-interior DOS at E_F decays with n. Confirms the +@ ELECTRON-OPACITY half ONLY (glue-transparent / bosonic cRPA half still deferred, L1).

children.name: H_016
children.role: H_016 competing-order ESCAPE
children.detail: Frustration η*<0.45 lifts H_014's wall — removable, but room-T amplitude uncleared.

children.name: H_017
children.role: H_017 disorder flat-band O2 CLOSED-NEGATIVE
children.detail: Disorder-flatness vs delocalization mutually exclusive.

children.name: H_018
children.role: H_018 adversarial held-out check of the central Tc estimator
children.detail: Passes geomean/bias (4/5) but FAILS per-material scatter (1061×) → room-T Tc extrapolations carry order-of-magnitude uncertainty (down-weight to coordinates; wall findings unaffected).

children.name: H_019
children.role: H_019 first REAL PBE DFT of the named +@ trilayer's two layers (🟡 PARTIAL)
children.detail: CoSn kagome flat band W=0.158 eV CONFIRMED but ~1.45 eV below E_F; Ta2NiSe5 296-e SCF unconverged → gap deferred.

children.name: H_023
children.role: H_023 demand-relaxation (🟠-CONDITIONAL, strongest 🟢-path)
children.detail: A modest multilayer D_s boost f_mult≥1.164 at N=2 lets the clean q=0 Ta2NiSe5 trio clear room-T; single unknown = real multilayer D_s.

children.name: H_024 geometry half
children.role: H_024 real-DFT follow-on (🟡 PARTIAL): closes the GEOMETRY half
children.detail: CoSn ∫tr g metric integral I=2.856 MATCHES measured QGT 2.87 (g≥2 lever survives); deep position is REAL orbital-selection not a PBE artifact; Peotta-Törmä+Huhtinen D_s(N=2) bound SUPPORTS H_023's f_mult≥1.164 (conditional on doping+coherence, is_green=False).

children.name: H_024 gap half
children.role: H_024: Ta2NiSe5 GAP half stays DEFERRED
children.detail: 296-e PBE SCF non-converging across 10 recipe variants; recipe-independent ill-conditioning of the excitonic-parent cell.

children.name: H_025 confirm
children.role: H_025 ta2nise5-symbroken-gap (🟡 PARTIAL POSITIVE): tested H_024's logged fix
children.detail: Experimental low-T monoclinic C2/c ground state (Sunshine&Ibers 1985) BREAKS the Cmcm freeze (residual ~30× descent, 17-18 → 0.45-0.64 Ry, live charge dynamics, across plain PBE and PBE+U(Ni-3d=3eV)). Symmetry-breaking insight CONFIRMED.

children.name: H_025 unresolved
children.role: H_025: gap STILL UNRESOLVED (not fabricated)
children.detail: Both plateau near-metallic (~0.5-0.9 Ry), don't reach 1e-6 on the SERIAL single-core QE build (prior -np 12 = 12 redundant serial copies). Fix = DFT-relaxed coords / denser k-mesh / HSE, needs a parallel build. Trio stays 🟠; absorbed=false.

children.name: H_023-prep scope
children.role: H_023-readiness-prep (SAFE prep, no compute)
children.detail: state/h023-dft-readiness-2026-06-25.md. Verified h019 DFT decks (pseudos/cutoffs 45-360 Ry/Ta8Ni4Se20=32 sane) but the cell is the SUPERSEDED Cmcm parent and every deck is a band-gap SCF deck, NOT a D_s deck.

children.name: H_023-prep walls
children.role: H_023 D_s lever 🔴 NOT run-ready — two measured walls
children.detail: (a) METHOD wall — multilayer superfluid stiffness D_s is NOT a pw.x observable (needs Wannier QGT or beyond-DFT BSE); (b) PBE THEORY wall — H_025/H_026 measured the monolayer gap oscillates near-metallic in PBE/PBE+U (beyond-PBE only).

children.name: H_023-prep honesty
children.role: H_023-prep: cheap route already closed; honesty caveat
children.detail: Cheap quantum-geometry route already closed by H_024 (f_mult≥1.164 at N=2, is_green=False); full N=2 stack intractable + method-walled. Even a clearing result = a falsification-survived PREDICTION not a discovery; gate closes only on accredited 4-probe + Meissner + measured H_c2/T_c; absorbed=false.

children.name: H_028 scope
children.role: H_028 Ni3In layer-A dodge test (REAL-DFT, 🟡)
children.detail: Backup research named Ni3In (Ye 2021 arXiv:2106.10824) as the kagome metal whose flat band sits ~50meV NEAR E_F — the natural escape from H_027's CoSn extreme-doping wall.

children.name: H_028 result
children.role: H_028 result: NO dodge in PBE
children.detail: OUR paramagnetic PBE DFT (DO19 Ni6In2, MPI per H_026, E_F=16.527eV) finds Ni-kagome flat-band manifold -0.84 to -1.57eV BELOW E_F (at least as deep as CoSn); the ~50meV is a correlated/DMFT position PBE doesn't reproduce.

children.name: H_028 verdict
children.role: H_028 verdict: NOT a better layer-A; lead stays CoSn
children.detail: Geometry lever MET (I=2.854≈CoSn 2.855≈QGT 2.87, kagome NN=a/2) but below E_F (ν=1.0, D_s edge-suppressed); spin-pol SCF magnetically UNSTABLE (abs-mag swings 11-27µB) → competing-order risk CoSn lacks. Trio 🟠, absorbed=false.

children.name: harness
children.role: tool/rtsc_harness.py — shared deterministic stdlib-only harness
children.detail: Anima-parity: shared machinery in repo-root tool/. Falsifier/evaluate core. Function groups below.

children.name: core estimators
children.role: core estimators
children.detail: two_lever_box_check, geometric_bkt_tc_band, allen_dynes_tc, omega_for_bkt_tc, PHONON_CEILING_MEV.

children.name: +@ bilayer
children.role: +@ bilayer functions
children.detail: proximity_bilayer_levers + critical_electron_cost.

children.name: combination scan
children.role: combination-scan functions
children.detail: THREED_TC_LEVER + stacked_tc + omega_for_stacked_tc.

children.name: connector C
children.role: connector-C functions
children.detail: spacer_window + spacer_electron_cost + spacer_phonon_transmission.

children.name: bosonic-glue crux
children.role: bosonic-glue-crux functions
children.detail: glue_through_spacer_window + coulomb_glue_coupling.

children.name: heavy compute
children.role: heavy real compute stays in src/, dispatched to the shared pool (summer)
children.detail: fbgeom_3d.py 3D geometry; lane_a_explicit_phonon_bipolaron_ed.py many-body ED; per heavy-on-pool.

children.name: runs
children.role: state/<hX>_<slug>_<date>/run_*.py + result.json — per-hypothesis deterministic run
children.detail: Imports tool/; verdict = verbatim stdout (no LLM self-judge).

children.name: dataflow
children.role: predict → screen → structure → deck → compute → gate → ledger
children.detail: Campaign questions also become falsifiable HYPOTHESES cards.

children.name: predict / screen
children.role: Input — flat-band geometry predictor + materials screening
children.detail: Materials Project / OPTIMADE / AFLOW / JARVIS screening → light-element metallic candidate roster.

children.name: structure / deck
children.role: Fetch structure → build turnkey QE deck → vc-relax/scf/ph
children.detail: build_deck.py / hexa deck.

children.name: compute / gate
children.role: Run el-ph (DFPT λ/ω_log/Tc) → falsifier cascade
